domain: textile, sewing, leatherworking, embroidery, and craft-machine hardware

ideas.product_context: Industrial sewing machine for thick canvas, denim, and layered upholstery fabric
ideas.core_function: Grip and advance fabric layers in sync with the presser foot without slippage
ideas.likely_main_part: Serrated feed dog block with staggered tooth rows, mounting slots, and needle clearance channel
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires repeated fine teeth on an irregular top surface, precise slot placement, asymmetric clearances, and functional contact geometry

ideas.idea_title: Leather Strap Edge Beveler Guide Shoe
ideas.product_context: Bench-mounted leatherworking edge beveling tool for belts, straps, and harness components
ideas.core_function: Hold a leather strap at a consistent offset and angle while guiding it past a cutting blade
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured guide shoe with V-groove, blade window, radiused entry lip, and clamp screw bosses
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled grooves, flowing guide surfaces, sharp blade clearances, small bosses, and ergonomic contact transitions

ideas.product_context: Commercial embroidery machine hooping fixture for fast fabric tensioning
ideas.core_function: Lock the outer hoop against the inner hoop with repeatable fabric tension using a rotating cam
ideas.likely_main_part: Eccentric cam lever with curved bearing face, hinge bore, detent notch, and finger tab
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests eccentric profiles, smooth cam contact surfaces, detents, hinge alignment, and nonuniform lever geometry

ideas.product_context: Craft cutting tool used for quilting fabric, felt, and pattern paper
ideas.core_function: Limit exposed blade depth while allowing fine adjustment for material thickness
ideas.likely_main_part: Threaded depth-control collar with scalloped grip rim, blade guard flange, and index marks
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires circular threading context, knurled or scalloped perimeter detail, thin guard features, and rotational adjustment semantics

ideas.product_context: Overlock sewing machine mechanism for forming interlocked edge stitches
ideas.core_function: Carry the looper tip through a timed arc around the needle path
ideas.likely_main_part: Offset looper carrier arm with split clamp bore, tapered neck, timing slot, and replaceable looper mount
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with compound offsets, thin curved arms, split clamping geometry, slot-and-bore relationships, and collision-critical clearances

ideas.product_context: Small handloom or sample loom that throws a shuttle across warp threads
ideas.core_function: Provide a low-friction track that keeps the shuttle aligned during travel
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved shuttle race insert with concave running channel, countersunk mounts, and raised end stops
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long shallow curves, concave tracks, end-stop transitions, countersinks, and parts whose function depends on continuous surface shape

ideas.product_context: Mechanical buttonhole attachment for domestic sewing machines
ideas.core_function: Drive needle swing and fabric movement pattern to form a consistent buttonhole shape
ideas.likely_main_part: Profile cam disk with asymmetric lobed groove, central drive bore, timing notch, and retaining groove
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing noncircular cam paths, internal grooves, rotational registration, and shape-driven motion intent

ideas.product_context: Leather skiving machine used to thin edges before folding or stitching
ideas.core_function: Press leather against the feed roller and blade while controlling skive width
ideas.likely_main_part: Narrow presser foot with curved sole, blade relief crescent, height-adjustment boss, and side guide face
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines thin functional lips, curved pressure surfaces, tight blade relief geometry, and small adjustment interfaces

ideas.product_context: Multi-needle embroidery machine upper thread tension assembly
ideas.core_function: Center and preload paired tension discs while routing thread through a controlled path
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped hub with spring seat, thread guide notch, retaining groove, and anti-rotation flat
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric stepped geometry, small thread-path features, spring seating surfaces, grooves, flats, and assembly-oriented constraints

ideas.product_context: Sewing and quilting attachment that folds fabric strips before stitching
ideas.core_function: Guide flat fabric tape into symmetrical folded edges at a fixed finished width
ideas.likely_main_part: Formed folding funnel body with tapered inlet, curled side channels, exit throat, and mounting tab
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Stresses CAD representation with sheet-like curved guide surfaces, tapered transitions, mirrored but nontrivial channels, and thin-wall manufacturing intent
